errors.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.ZONE_ACCESS_DENIED: You do not have access to this zone
errors.NOT_ORG_MEMBER: You are not a member of this organization
errors.SOLE_OWNER_CANNOT_LEAVE: You are the only owner. Transfer ownership to another member or delete the organization.
errors.ALREADY_OWNER: This member is already an owner
errors.CANNOT_CHANGE_OWNER_ROLE: Cannot change the zone role of an owner
errors.OWNER_REQUIRED_FOR_ADMIN: Only an owner can change the role of an admin
errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_USED: This email is already in use
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.TERMS_NOT_ACCEPTED: You must accept the terms to create an account
errors.REGISTRATION_DISABLED: Registration is disabled. Contact the administrator for an invitation.
errors.OAUTH_ONLY_ACCOUNT: This account uses {provider}. Sign in with that provider.
errors.RESET_TOKEN_INVALID: Invalid link. Request a new one.
errors.RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Expired link. Request a new one.
errors.TOTP_SESSION_EXPIRED: Verification session expired. Log in again.
errors.OAUTH_EMAIL_MISSING: Could not retrieve your email from the provider
errors.SAML_NOT_CONFIGURED: SAML SSO not configured for this organization
errors.SAML_EMAIL_MISSING: No valid email found in the SAML response
errors.INVITE_NOT_FOUND: Invitation not found or already used
errors.INVITE_EMAIL_MISMATCH: This invitation is intended for another email
errors.INVITE_ALREADY_MEMBER: This user already has a role in this zone
errors.INVITE_ALREADY_PENDING: An invitation is already pending for this email
errors.ROLE_INVALID: Invalid role. Must be admin, member or viewer
errors.MUTED_RULE_NOT_FOUND: Rule not found in muted rules
errors.DEFAULT_ZONE_IMMUTABLE: The default zone cannot be modified (name/patterns)
errors.DEFAULT_ZONE_UNDELETABLE: The default zone cannot be deleted
errors.ZONE_NAME_TAKEN: A zone with this name already exists
errors.PATTERNS_REQUIRED: At least one path is required
errors.PATTERN_INVALID: Invalid pattern: "{pattern}". Must start with / or be **
errors.ALERT_NOT_FOUND: Alert not found or already resolved
errors.TRIAL_EXPIRED: Your 14-day trial has ended. Enable billing in settings to continue.
errors.TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS: Too many attempts. Retry in {minutes} min.
errors.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Retry in {minutes} min.
errors.NO_STRIPE_CUSTOMER: No Stripe customer linked to this account
errors.STRIPE_ERROR: Something went wrong with Stripe. Please try again.
